# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-18

Cloudflare says WordPress sites face a new SQL injection issue and a critical unauthenticated RCE, and it has blocking WAF rules live for proxied customers.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Cloudflare adds WAF coverage for two new WordPress vulnerabilities
   Credible, immediate risk item with a concrete patch action.

2. Dify 1.16.0 adds sandboxed agents and warns users off Chat Completions defaults
   Relevant to agent-builder tooling and to current OpenAI API migration decisions.

3. Val Town now surfaces AGENTS.md to Townie and external agents
   Directly relevant to persistent agent-context and MCP workflow design.

4. Vercel stops charging Sandbox ingress downloads
   Directly changes cost assumptions for agent and CI-style sandbox workloads.

5. Julia Evans notes a few hard-earned SQLite operations lessons
   Useful, concrete operational lessons for small-site database decisions.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-07-18
